meta.title: Scluba — The branded digital scorecard for your golf club
meta.description: Your golfers play. Your club shines. Scluba turns every round into social visibility for your golf course — no app to install.

launch.text: First month free for the first 10 clubs

hero.tagline:
Your players share.
With you, this time.
hero.subtagline: The digital scorecard branded to your club. Every round mentions your golf on social — without ad spend.

lines: Every round, the same move: snap a photo of the paper scorecard.
Send it to friends. Post a story.
No trace of the club we just played at.
problem.punchline: Everything went digital in our lives. Except that moment.

insight.title: What if that broken moment became your best marketing tool?
insight.sub: A scorecard branded to your club is an Instagram post with your logo. Every round. No ad spend.

pillars.title: Everything you need, in 3 pillars.
pillars.lead: A branded digital scorecard, a live leaderboard for your players, a QR frame for your desk. Zero installation, zero burden on your team.

founders_quote.text: We didn't set out to build an app. We wanted an elegant frame that turns a round into a shared souvenir — and a post for the club.

items.title: Branded digital scorecard
items.body: Colors, logo, typography, your club's actual course. A web app — no download, no account for the player.

items.title: Live leaderboard + share
items.body: Real-time leaderboard during the round. Final card sharable as image and link, with your logo as signature.

items.title: QR frame on the counter
items.body: An elegant display delivered turnkey, placed at reception or the pro shop. The player scans, the round starts.

flow.phase1Title: One QR. The whole round signed in within 30 seconds.
flow.phase1Lead: Player 1 creates the round by scanning the QR at the desk. Others join with the same code — no app, no account, no magic-link.
flow.phase2Title: A real branded scorecard. Not a screenshot.
flow.phase2Lead: Club identity, Front 9 / Back 9 rows, birdie/par/bogey cells, SCLUBA signature. Hole-by-hole entry for every player.
flow.phase3Lead: Personal photo, 1080×1350 PNG, native iOS / Android / desktop sheet. The club shows up in every feed.
flow.joinHelper: Type this code or scan the desk QR

showcase.title: One card per club identity.
showcase.lead: Coastal, forest, classic, clay: the card adopts the visual codes of your golf course. No generic templates. No third-party branding.

benefits.title: Three concrete benefits for your golf course.
benefits.lead: Beyond the gadget: a visibility lever, a brand signal, a step ahead of neighboring clubs.

items.title: Organic visibility
items.body: Every shared round mentions your club on social. No ad budget to unlock, no campaign to manage — your players become your best ambassadors.

items.title: Modern brand image
items.body: A strong signal for golfers under 45 in an aging sport. Your club shows it lives with its time — without giving up its style.

items.title: Differentiation
items.body: The first modern club in your region. A concrete pitch for prospects and members, and an edge against neighboring golfs.

how.title: See your card before you sign.
how.lead: Give us your golf's URL. We extract logo, colors and photos to build your mockup in 24h. No commitment, no credit card.

items.title: 5 min on the phone
items.body: You share your website URL. We briefly discuss your identity, your courses, your constraints.

items.title: Mockup in 24h
items.body: A card in your image, ready to validate. Unlimited tweaks until your green light — you see exactly what your players will see.

items.title: QR frame delivered
items.body: An elegant frame ready to place on the reception desk. Zero technical install on the club side, zero burden on your team.

items.title: Monthly reporting
items.body: An email recap every month: scans, rounds played, social shares. The impact of your card, readable in 30 seconds.

pricing.title: One offer. One promise.
pricing.lead: Everything you need to turn every round into club visibility. No commitment, cancel any month.

trust.setup_note: No install on the player side

plans.name: Scluba
plans.tagline: A branded scorecard, shared by every player.
features: Natural social-media presence with every round
Elegant QR frame delivered to the reception desk
Multi-player live score entry, no install
Souvenir photo included with every round
Monthly email reporting: scans, rounds, shares

faq.title: We've anticipated your questions.
faq.lead: The questions golf club managers ask us most often. If yours isn't here, drop us a line.

items.q: Does the player need to install an app?
items.a: No. A QR scan opens the web app in their browser. No install, no account. Native sharing then works on any phone.

items.q: Do you need our logo and brand guidelines?
items.a: No. We start from your website and automatically extract logo, colors and photos. Mockup delivered within 24h, refined until your validation.

items.q: How do we track Scluba usage at the club?
items.a: Every month you receive a clear email reporting: number of scans, rounds played, social shares. No interface to learn, no tools to install on the club side.
None by default, cancel any month. The 3-year commitment gives −20% off ($39/month).

items.q: Do you need any specific equipment at the club?
items.a: No. The provided QR frame is the only thing to set up. It works without power, without club wifi, without your team's intervention.

items.q: Is this an official handicap tracking tool?
items.a: No. Scluba is a leisure round and social-sharing tool. It complements your official tools without replacing them.

items.q: How many clubs are already onboard?
items.a: We're launching our commercial offer in summer 2026 with a pilot of founding club partners. The 1st-month-free offer is reserved for the first 10 clubs — you get direct support from the co-founders.

cta.title: See what your card would look like before any decision.
cta.lead: Give us your golf course URL, we generate the mockup in 24h. No credit card required.

form.name: Your name
form.success: Thanks, we'll get back to you within 24h.
form.error: Oops, something went wrong. Try again or email us directly.

footer.tagline: The branded digital scorecard for golf clubs.
